Then, if they do not have a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, this effect is removed, and they gain the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.

languages.text: Обладатель аугмента автоматически не может {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклониться{/g} от следующей атаки. Если у него не {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалечена нога{/g}, то затем этот эффект снимается, и он получает эффект {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}кинетическое ускорение{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user automatically fails to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} the next attack. Then, if they do not have a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, this effect is removed, and they gain the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: Обладатель аугмента автоматически не может {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклониться{/g} от следующей атаки. Если у него не {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалечена нога{/g}, то затем этот эффект снимается, и он получает эффект {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}кинетическое ускорение{/g}.

Обладатель аугмента автоматически не может {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклониться{/g} от следующей атаки. Если у него не {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}покалечена нога{/g}, то затем этот эффект снимается, и он получает эффект {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}кинетическое ускорение{/g}.

languages.text: El usuario falla automáticamente al intentar {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivar{/g} el próximo ataque. Después, si no tiene una {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}pierna lisiada{/g}, este efecto se elimina y el usuario gana el efecto {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}aceleración cinética{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user automatically fails to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} the next attack. Then, if they do not have a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, this effect is removed, and they gain the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: El usuario falla automáticamente al intentar {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivar{/g} el próximo ataque. Después, si no tiene una {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}pierna lisiada{/g}, este efecto se elimina y el usuario gana el efecto {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}aceleración cinética{/g}.

languages.text: Der Nutzer kann dem nächsten Angriff nicht {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweichen{/g}. Hat er kein {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}verkrüppeltes Bein{/g}, wird dieser Effekt danach entfernt und er erhält den Effekt {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Kinetische Beschleunigung{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user automatically fails to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} the next attack. Then, if they do not have a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, this effect is removed, and they gain the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: Der Nutzer kann dem nächsten Angriff nicht {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweichen{/g}. Hat er kein {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}verkrüppeltes Bein{/g}, wird dieser Effekt danach entfernt und er erhält den Effekt {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Kinetische Beschleunigung{/g}.

languages.text: Kullanıcının bir sonraki saldırıdan {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınması{/g} otomatikman başarısız olur. Ardından {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}kötürüm bacağa{/g} sahip değilse bu etki ortadan kaybolur ve {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetik hızlanma{/g} etkisi kazanır.
languages.original_text: The user automatically fails to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} the next attack. Then, if they do not have a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, this effect is removed, and they gain the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcının bir sonraki saldırıdan {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınması{/g} otomatikman başarısız olur. Ardından {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}kötürüm bacağa{/g} sahip değilse bu etki ortadan kaybolur ve {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetik hızlanma{/g} etkisi kazanır.

languages.text: L'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} de l'utilisateur contre la prochaine attaque échoue automatiquement. Ensuite, s'il ne souffre pas de {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}Jambe mutilée{/g}, cet effet se dissipe et il bénéficie d'{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Accélération cinétique{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user automatically fails to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} the next attack. Then, if they do not have a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, this effect is removed, and they gain the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: L'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} de l'utilisateur contre la prochaine attaque échoue automatiquement. Ensuite, s'il ne souffre pas de {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}Jambe mutilée{/g}, cet effet se dissipe et il bénéficie d'{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}Accélération cinétique{/g}.

languages.text: 使用者必定无法{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}下一次攻击。随后，若未处于{g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}腿骨骨折{/g}状态，移除此效果并获得{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}动能加速{/g}效果。
languages.original_text: The user automatically fails to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} the next attack. Then, if they do not have a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, this effect is removed, and they gain the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: 使用者必定无法{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}下一次攻击。随后，若未处于{g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}腿骨骨折{/g}状态，移除此效果并获得{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}动能加速{/g}效果。

languages.text: 使用者は次の攻撃の{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}に自動的に失敗する。その後、{g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}脚部損傷{/g}を負っていなければ、この効果は除去され、{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}運動加速{/g}効果を得る。
languages.original_text: The user automatically fails to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} the next attack. Then, if they do not have a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}, this effect is removed, and they gain the {g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}kinetic acceleration{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: 使用者は次の攻撃の{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}に自動的に失敗する。その後、{g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}脚部損傷{/g}を負っていなければ、この効果は除去され、{g|f:f455dc1c487a44fc9e0e8010024a031a}運動加速{/g}効果を得る。
